summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Leadway AI Readiness & Opportunity Scan application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with one critical navigation issue after submission.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful submission, user is redirected to landing page instead of thank you page
ui_bugs.selector: Submit button completes but navigation to /thank-you fails

integration_issues.issue: Submission API succeeds but frontend navigation fails

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console about width/height being -1

passed_tests: Landing page loads with countdown timer, logo, and Start Assessment button
Email validation works (empty and invalid formats rejected)
Valid email allows proceeding to assessment form
Assessment form section 1 (Participant Profile) with required field validation
Multi-step form navigation with progress bar
Rating scale inputs work correctly
Multi-select checkboxes work
Draft autosave API works (POST /api/drafts)
Review page shows summary of all answers
Submission API works (POST /api/submissions) - data is saved
Admin login page accessible at /admin
Admin login with password 'leadway2026' grants access
Admin dashboard shows stats, charts, and submissions table
CSV export functionality works
Filters work on admin dashboard
All 11 backend API endpoints working correctly
Admin authentication and authorization working
Form validation working across all sections
Multi-step form progression working
Draft save functionality working

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All features working except submission completion navigation

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix submission completion flow - after successful API submission, ensure user is properly navigated to /thank-you page instead of being redirected to landing page. The submission data is being saved correctly but the frontend navigation is failing.
